name: project-google-accounts
description: Route Gmail, Google Calendar, and Google Drive access through project-specific Google OAuth accounts.

interface.shortDescription: Use different Google accounts per Codex project
interface.longDescription: Local MCP server that maps project folders to Google OAuth accounts and exposes direct Gmail, Google Calendar, and Google Drive tools without changing the account used to sign in to Codex.
defaultPrompt: Connect a Google account for this project
Check Gmail for this project account
Check Calendar for this project account
Create a Google Doc in this project account
